secrets.description: On-chain game wallet address. Incoming guesses are sent here; payouts are sent from here.
Secret key paired with APP_PUBKEY, used to sign server-side payout transactions.
Sidecar Usernode RPC endpoint. Resolves via Docker network in production.
Round duration in milliseconds before the timer expires.
Minimum number of guesses required before a round can end. If not met, the round extends.
